description: Warmup period of 10 bars is shorter than the 50-bar SMA window required.
explanation: The strategy skips only the first 10 bars but immediately computes a 50-bar SMA. During bars 10-49, data.history() returns fewer than 50 observations, and the SMA is based on partial data. The early SMA values are not meaningful and can generate misleading signals during the warmup period.
suggested_fix: Set warmup_period equal to the longest lookback window used in the strategy.

issues.title: Warmup period shorter than SMA window produces invalid early signals
